title: hieracium simia subsp. simia
intro: Hieracium simia subsp. simia is a plant species in the dandelion family, known for its use in traditional medicine. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium simia subsp. simia include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight bacterial infections, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Hieracium simia subsp. simia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its herbal preparations are often used to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress.
